footer.tagline: Ending land fraud in Cameroon with blockchain and AI.
footer.disclaimer: LandChain is a verification and record-integrity layer. It does not replace the official government land registry or your legal land title.

hero.badge: Blockchain + AI land verification for Cameroon
hero.subtitle: Every year, thousands of Cameroonians lose lifetime savings to forged titles, double sales and identity fraud. LandChain makes every land record tamper-evident — and verifiable in seconds.

problem.title: Land fraud is stealing lifetimes of savings
problem.subtitle: It is the single largest driver of litigation in Cameroon — and generative AI is making forgery dramatically easier every year.
problem.stat1Label: of civil court cases are land-related disputes
problem.stat2Label: spent in court fighting for land already paid for
problem.stat3Label: commonly lost per fraud case — often a lifetime of savings

items.title: Double and triple selling
items.text: The same parcel sold to several buyers, common in urban markets like Douala and Yaoundé.

items.title: Forged titles
items.text: Land registered with falsified administrative documents and fake stamps.

items.title: Altered records
items.text: Ownership records changed after the fact, without authorization.

items.title: Identity impersonation
items.text: Transfers executed with stolen or deepfaked identities.

problem.aiWarning: Generative AI can now produce near-perfect forged certificates, synthetic signatures and deepfake IDs in seconds. Manual, paper-based verification cannot keep pace — the gap widens every year.

solution.title: One source of truth for every parcel
solution.subtitle: LandChain pairs an immutable ownership ledger with AI document authentication, so fraud is detected in seconds — not discovered years later in court.

items.title: Immutable ownership ledger
items.text: Every transaction permanently recorded on Polygon — nothing can be silently altered or deleted.

items.title: Instant verification
items.text: Ownership verification drops from days or weeks to seconds.

items.title: Duplicate-sale detection
items.text: A parcel already registered or sold cannot be re-registered without a flag.

items.title: AI document authentication
items.text: Detects forged, manipulated or AI-generated documents with high accuracy.

items.title: Full traceability
items.text: Every ownership change traceable from the parcel's origin to today.

items.title: Human-in-the-loop review
items.text: No AI verdict ever rejects a document alone — trained reviewers make every final call.

howItWorks.title: From registration to safe transfer
howItWorks.subtitle: Four steps, designed so anyone can protect their land — no blockchain knowledge required.

steps.title: Register
steps.text: Complete KYC, pin your parcel on the map and upload your documents.

steps.title: Verify
steps.text: AI checks document authenticity; records are anchored on-chain.

steps.title: Track
steps.text: Follow every transaction on your parcel with full history.

steps.title: Transact
steps.text: Transfer ownership safely, with optional notary co-signing.

items.title: A notebook nobody can secretly edit
items.text: When your parcel is registered, a cryptographic fingerprint is written to the Polygon blockchain forever. Any tampering becomes instantly visible to everyone.

items.title: AI that reads documents like an expert
items.text: Stamps, fonts, signatures and the invisible traces of AI-generated forgeries — analysed in seconds, reviewed by humans before any decision.

items.title: Your privacy, protected by design
items.text: Personal data and documents never touch the blockchain. Only anonymous fingerprints go on-chain — your identity stays off it.

marketplacePreview.title: Verified land, ready to buy
marketplacePreview.subtitle: Every listed parcel has passed LandChain verification and is not under dispute — so what you see is what you actually get.

about.title: About LandChain
about.missionText: To make land fraud impossible to hide. We pair an immutable ownership ledger with AI-based document authentication so that forged titles, duplicate sales and identity impersonation are detected in seconds — not discovered years later in court.
about.whyNowText: Generative AI can produce near-perfect forged land certificates, synthetic signatures and deepfake identity documents in seconds. The gap between fraud capability and detection capability widens every year. Cameroon needs a trusted verification layer today, not in five years.
about.storyText: LandChain was founded after watching families lose lifetime savings to land they legally purchased — land that turned out to be sold twice, or registered with forged papers. We believe every buyer deserves to check a title's authenticity before money changes hands.
about.legalNote: LandChain is a verification and record-integrity layer. It is not a legal replacement for the official government land registry — it is the trusted check you run before any transaction.

team.title: Three builders on a mission
team.subtitle: Engineering, AI safety, and land-sector expertise — united against fraud in Cameroon.
team.joinText: We're always looking for engineers, AI researchers, and land-administration experts who care about property rights.

members.name: Romaric Lonfonyuy
members.bio: 5+ years building production software across fintech and proptech. Leads LandChain's blockchain anchoring, AI verification pipeline, and platform architecture.

members.name: Anoh Precious Akwe
members.bio: Specialist in responsible AI, model safety, and adversarial testing. Ensures LandChain's document verification and KYC pipelines are fair, secure, and resistant to misuse.

members.name: Tawe Divine
members.bio: Drives go-to-market strategy and institutional partnerships across Cameroon's land administration ecosystem.

howItWorksPage.title: How LandChain works
howItWorksPage.subtitle: From registration to safe transfer, in four steps.

tech.title: The technology, in plain words
tech.subtitle: Serious infrastructure behind a simple experience — no blockchain knowledge required.
tech.blockchain: Think of the blockchain as a public notebook that nobody can secretly edit. When your parcel is registered, a fingerprint of the record is written into that notebook forever. If anyone tampers with the record later, the fingerprint no longer matches — and everyone can see it.
tech.ai: Our AI examines documents the way a trained expert would — checking stamps, fonts, signatures and the invisible traces that AI-generated forgeries leave behind. Anything suspicious goes to a human reviewer: no machine ever rejects your documents on its own.
tech.privacy: Your personal data and documents never go on the blockchain. Only anonymous fingerprints (hashes) are stored on-chain.

howItWorksPage.ctaTitle: Ready to verify your first parcel?
howItWorksPage.ctaText: Run a free basic lookup now — or create an account for full verification reports.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free basic lookups for everyone. Full verification and marketplace listings are paid.
pricing.manualRenewal: Subscriptions renew manually — we'll remind you by email before expiry. No automatic charges.

listing.title: Marketplace listing
listing.text: List your verified parcel for sale for {days} days

pricing.payment: Payments via MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money, processed securely by Fapshi.

items.a: Yes. LandChain is a verification and record-integrity platform. We record and verify evidence about land documents and transactions. We operate alongside — not instead of — official land administration.

items.q: Does this replace my official land title?
items.a: No. A LandChain record is strong verification evidence, not a legal substitute for the official government land title. Think of LandChain as the trusted check you run before any transaction.

Your personal data and documents are stored securely off-chain with strict access control. Only anonymous cryptographic fingerprints (hashes) are stored on the blockchain — never your identity or documents.
Payments are processed by Fapshi, a Cameroonian payment gateway supporting MTN Mobile Money and Orange Money. LandChain never sees or stores your mobile money credentials.

items.q: How does the AI verification work?
items.a: Our AI checks document metadata, stamps, fonts, signatures and traces of AI-generated forgery. Any suspicious result is reviewed by a human before any action is taken — AI never rejects a document on its own.
No. Fapshi does not support automatic recurring charges, so renewal is manual. We email you 7 days and 1 day before expiry so you never lose access unexpectedly.

items.q: Can I list any land for sale?
items.a: Only parcels that are registered on LandChain, verified, and not under dispute can be listed on the marketplace. This is a trust feature: buyers know every listing passed verification.
